calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-11-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk Nicole Olcomendy, Reporter Beldon Yee.
Parties present Jeffrey Shelton plaintiff in pro per, Samuel Harrison defendant in pro per.

Cause called for trial, settled by stipulation, the terms of which are as follows: Defendant will vacate the premises at 643A Castro, San Francisco, CA on or before May-01-2002. Defendant will pay the rent for Feb., Mar. and Apr. to the plaintiff in the following manner. Rent for February will be offset by the $650 security deposit paid by defendant, held by the landlord. Rent for March for the sum of $650 will be paid to plaintiff by the end of today, March 11, 2002 by check. Rent for April will be reduced from $650 to $325 payable to plaintiff no later than April 1, 2002. The is a waiver of Civil Code 1542 and a general release. If the terms of this settlement are met, plaintiff will dismiss this case with prejudice. If the terms are not complied with, the plaintiff may move ex parte with 24 hours notice for writ of execution for possession and any rent still owing.
